01 — The Insight Gap

Your data has the answers.
But the system is broken.

Most organisations are drowning in data yet starving for insight. Here's why traditional analytics fails at every turn.

01
Fragmented Insights

Data scattered across dashboards, spreadsheets, and legacy systems. Every team sees a different truth.

Every team sees a different truth.
02
Analyst Bottlenecks

Simple questions require analyst effort. Weeks of wait for basic answers. Self-serve is a myth, not reality.

Self-serve is a myth, not reality.
03
Inconsistent KPIs

Different teams, different logic, different numbers. Low trust. Nobody agrees on what the numbers mean.

Nobody agrees on what the numbers mean.
04
"Dark" Data

Operational and quality data sits unused. No tool connects it all. The most valuable data never gets asked.

The most valuable data never gets asked.

03 — How It Works

Multi-Agent Intelligence,
by Design

AMA doesn't just query data. It reasons through problems the way an experienced analyst would — but in seconds, with perfect consistency, every single time.

01
INTENT

Understands what you're really asking — even with ambiguous, natural language queries.

02
PLANNING

Determines the right analysis approach — selects KPIs, data sources, and methodology.

03
EXECUTION

Queries governed data with standardized KPI logic — consistent results every time.

04
VALIDATION

Multi-agent verification ensures accuracy — statistical checks, outlier detection, cross-validation.

05
INSIGHT

Delivers explanation, not just numbers — root cause, confidence scores, and next steps.

Every answer is governed by standardized business logic. Every output is validated before delivery. Every interaction builds context for the next.
Operations Leader asks
"Why has our average handle time increased for pension transfer queries this month compared to last?"
01 INTENT
Identifies
Handle time metric, pension transfers, month-over-month comparison
02 PLAN
Selects
AHT by query type, volume analysis, staffing levels, complexity scoring
03 EXECUTE
Queries
Call logs, categorisation, staffing roster, SLA metrics
04 VALIDATE
Cross-checks
Statistical significance, sample size, outlier detection
05 EXPLAIN
Delivers
Root cause with confidence score, visual breakdown, and next steps
AMA's Response
Average handle time for pension transfer queries increased 23% (4m 12s → 5m 11s). Primary driver: 34% spike in complex inter-scheme transfers following the April regulatory update. Secondary factor: 3 experienced agents on leave, increasing proportion of calls handled by agents with <6 months tenure. Recommended actions: update transfer scripts for new regulations, prioritise refresher training.

04 — Capabilities

Six Pillars of Enterprise Intelligence

Intelligence & accuracy by design, with security and collaboration built in from the ground up.

🎯
Accuracy By Design

Multi-agent validation ensures the right KPI is selected, the right logic applied, and the right answer delivered. Every time.

→ Enterprise-grade accuracy, by construction.
⏰
Always-On Agents

Agents run continuously, monitoring KPIs and trends. When thresholds breach, your team knows instantly via Teams or Slack.

→ Issues surface in seconds, not weeks.
🧠
Deep Memory

AMA remembers previous conversations, understands follow-up intent, and builds context over time. No need to re-explain.

→ Conversations flow like thinking, not querying.
⌘
Root Cause Analysis

Automated trend decomposition, driver analysis, and root-cause explanations. Go from "what happened" to "why."

→ Deep insight, not surface-level reporting.
🔒
Enterprise Security

SSO, RBAC, policy-driven access. Cloud-native security alignment. Your data never leaves your controlled environment.

→ Zero-trust architecture. Full compliance.
🤝
Collaborative Intelligence

Share insights, charts, and explanations across teams instantly. Continue any conversation where a colleague left off.

→ One shared understanding across the org.

06 — In Practice

Real Enterprise Deployments

AMA is live inside leading enterprises — turning analytics from a cost centre into a strategic weapon.

🏦
Contact Centre Intelligence
Leading UK Pension Administrator
The Organisation

Pensions and benefits administration specialist serving 1,100+ clients and 7 million members globally, with 3,500+ employees across the UK, US, India, and Portugal.

The Challenge

Contact centre leaders lacked real-time visibility. Identifying breaches and root causes required manual report pulls across multiple systems. By the time issues surfaced, the damage was done.

Expected Impact
Proactive Alerting
Real-time MS Teams notifications with root-cause explanation
Deep Research
Explore trends, drivers, and correlations in plain English
Faster Decisions
From "what happened" to "why" in seconds, not days
Cost Savings
Lower escalations, improve first-call resolution metrics
⚙️
P&L Intelligence
Global Engineering Services Firm
The Organisation

Global engineering R&D services leader with 24,000+ engineers across 23 design centres, serving 69 Fortune 500 clients. Annual revenue exceeding $1.3 billion.

The Challenge

Leadership couldn't connect financial performance to workforce dynamics. Margin erosion, bench costs, and project profitability required weeks of manual analysis across fragmented ERP and HR systems.

Expected Impact
Margin Clarity
Instant visibility into project-level profitability and margin drivers
Utilisation Intel
Real-time bench analysis and staffing efficiency by grade
P&L Linkage
Connect attrition, bench costs, billability to financial outcomes
Executive Speed
From quarterly cycles to real-time decisions on governed data

09 — Security

Enterprise-Grade Security
by Design

AMA is deployed inside your environment. Your data never leaves your network.

🔗
Zero External Dependencies

Fully hosted within your cloud environment (AWS/Azure). No external API calls, no SaaS dependencies. LLMs and agents run entirely inside your secured network.

🛡️
No PII Processing

AMA operates on operational and performance data only — NPS, KPIs, complaint trends, quality metrics. No personal or member data is used at any stage.

⚡
Zero Trust Architecture

Access secured through Entra ID / Auth0 with SSO and MFA. Network access via Zscaler (ZIA/ZPA). Users never placed directly on the network.

Compliance & Standards
Data Encryption TLS 1.2+ in transit, AES-256 at rest
Authentication Entra ID / Auth0 SSO with MFA enforced
Authorisation Fine-grained RBAC by role, dataset, and KPI
Data Sovereignty All processing in-region. Data never crosses geo boundaries
Audit Trail All user actions and data access fully logged
Monitoring Centralised health, usage, and performance alerting
Disaster Recovery HA deployment with automated failover (RTO < 1 hour)
Cloud-Native Runs on your existing AWS/Azure. No new infrastructure
